title: Building a Production-Ready Library in Noir with Maxim Vezenov | NoirCon 3 Devconnect 2025
description:
A hands-on deep dive into advanced Noir features through a real-world case study.

Maxim Vezenov, Noir Software Engineer, walks through building a simplified big number library using traits, generics, and metaprogramming, highlighting best practices for writing flexible, performant, and scalable Noir code.
